examples: Gum problems increase the risk of atherosclerosis.
Two of her three main coronary arteries were calcified, a marker of atherosclerosis.
It is well known that atherosclerosis progression is intimately linked with inflammation in the arteries.
In rabbits prone to atherosclerosis, one compound reduced plaque deposits by 30% in three months.
MummySeveral years ago investigators first reported finding evidence of atherosclerosis in 20 of 44 Egyptian mummies.
